## tscli config profiles set-active

Set the active tailnet profile

### Synopsis

Set the active tailnet profile that runtime commands will use when no flag or environment override is provided.

```
tscli config profiles set-active <name> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
tscli config profiles set-active _lbr_sandbox
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for set-active
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -k, --api-key string   Tailscale API key
  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [human json pretty yaml]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```

### SEE ALSO

* [tscli config profiles](tscli_config_profiles.md)	 - Manage tailnet profiles
